# AppClipDefaultExperience.Attributes

**Object**

The attributes that describe a Default App Clip Experiences resource.

## Declaration

```swift
object AppClipDefaultExperience.Attributes
```

## Objects

- **AppClipDefaultExperience.Relationships**: The relationships of the Default App Clip Experiences resource you included in the request and those on which you can operate.
